message:
fix(engine): harden attestation handshake with challenge signature verification, quote inclusion in canonical bytes, and authorization re-signing

attestation_handshake.rs:
- AttestationResponse::canonical_bytes(): include attestation quote fields
  in the canonical byte representation so response signatures commit to
  the full quote content (measurement, nonce, timestamps, trust level,
  platform, signature, signer key)
- Add append_attestation_quote_canonical_bytes() helper for deterministic
  quote serialization
- PolicyPlaneVerifier::verify_response(): insert challenge signature
  verification as the first step (before freshness/nonce checks) to
  reject forged challenges early, preventing an attacker from crafting a
  challenge with a known nonce
- Add HandshakeError::ChallengeSignatureInvalid variant
- PolicyPlaneVerifier::verify_authorization(): verify the authorization
  signature against canonical_bytes() to catch tampered authorizations
- Add HandshakeError::AuthorizationSignatureInvalid variant
- issue_authorization(): sign against auth.canonical_bytes() instead of
  an ad-hoc (cell_id || timestamp) preimage, ensuring the signature
  commits to all authorization fields
- Renumber verification steps 1-8 → 1-9 in comments to reflect the new
  challenge verification step

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
